author: mthuret
subject: v4.0.0-beta.4
body: # [4.0.0-beta.4](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.0-beta.3...v4.0.0-beta.4) (2017-04-25) ### Bug Fixes * **MultIndex:** no need to nest hits, if those are from main index. (algolia/react-instantsearch#56) ([a8cb4c6](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a8cb4c6)) ### Features * **MultiIndex:** remove the need for virtual hits when using connectAutoComplete (algolia/react-instantsearch#45) ([73448a0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/73448a0))
